description: Intentional divergences from the baseline template. CTRL-004 checks this before deploying any hook or setting, and deploys a snapshot to each repo's controller-note/exclusions.json. Any agent or audit hook modifying settings.json MUST check this file first.

schema_notes.action.do_not_add: Universal: never deploy this item, even if requested
schema_notes.action.allow_optin: Universal exclusion EXCEPT for repos listed in optin file
schema_notes.optin_file: Path relative to repo root listing repos that explicitly opt in

entries.reason: Causes excessive workflow noise on Ether; session_guard reports false positives
Intentionally removed 2026-05-20; Leviathan is a memory store, not a workflow executor
Intentionally removed 2026-05-20; replaced by post_action_notify.py which has dedup logic

entries.description: PostToolUse auto-commit when lines>200 or files>2
entries.reason: Opinionated workflow; auto-commit + auto-push to origin main is destructive in repos with WIP, feature branches, or large generated artifacts. See reference/baseline_design_principles.md C6.

entries.description: CTRL-006 GitHub Actions workflow that publishes built HTML to a public GitHub Pages mirror
entries.reason: Per-target config required (5 pieces: target repo, pages branch, source folder, path-stripping, PAT). Wrong target = data leak. Requires per-target Designer authorization per safety contract. Reference template at reference/ctrl006_mirror_workflow.md.
Retired 2026-03-31 -- session_guard + pre_commit_guard now auto-clean stale artifacts (no need for a dedicated hook). Found drifted in 8 sister repos via drift_check 2026-05-25.
Retired 2026-03-31 -- ping_check.py replaces this entirely (Stop event with full ping awareness). Keeping both causes duplicate stop-event execution.
